title: Femme Keel
wikitext:
[]: Femme Keel             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Tue Nov 13, 2007 5:15 pm I have purchased the strangest peice of Eva merchandise ever created. Behold Femme-Keel in all HER glory. and compared to my old Keel toy [/list]

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Tue Nov 13, 2007 5:22 pm WAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAUUUGGGHH! Ok now that I got that out , is this a spinoff from angelXX or something?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Nov 13, 2007 5:30 pm There's a Fem-Everyone in Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Nov 13, 2007 6:16 pm Sweet. ....Does this mean Keel is as "smooth as a porpoise" where his boyparts should be? XD That is pretty cool but weird. That looks like something for one of those Petite Eva @ School things...I thought it was.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Nov 13, 2007 6:17 pm BrikHaus wrote: There's a Fem-Everyone in Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Tue Nov 13, 2007 6:58 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Sweet. ....Does this mean Keel is as "smooth as a porpoise" where his boyparts should be? XD That is pretty cool but weird. That looks like something for one of those Petite Eva @ School things...I thought it was.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Nov 13, 2007 7:40 pm I have Yui with "Gen" and "Kou" hand-puppets, and I think I'm stopping there... :shock:

[]:             Quote Post by Barinax » Tue Nov 13, 2007 7:57 pm BrikHaus wrote: There's a Fem-Everyone in Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Nov 13, 2007 8:04 pm Barinax wrote: I think a male version of everyone would be interesting too.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Nov 13, 2007 8:19 pm Barinax wrote: BrikHaus wrote: There's a Fem-Everyone in Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Tue Nov 13, 2007 8:29 pm http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=n9ZOf-3q2x4 Exactly what you were talking about.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Nov 13, 2007 8:47 pm Correct, Shiro. Neon Gender Evangelion. Urk!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Nov 13, 2007 9:39 pm UrsusArctos wrote: but only bishies make the gender transition without looking disgusting. (Gendo and Fuyutsuki with lipstick...ugh!)

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Nov 13, 2007 9:44 pm I suppose Gendo isn't Gendo without the beard. I was thinking too much in terms of that awful Neon Gender video. Now that you mention Keel as a grandma, an old lady in a high-necked blouse and with hair in a bun comes to mind.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Nov 13, 2007 9:58 pm Reichu: Are you talking about the usual THAT BOARD reipost of the Shinji and the stooges being female, Asuka and the others being male, and the female Fuyu and Gendou? Personally I think Gendou looks horrible in that. Fuyu-chan looks okay though.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Tue Nov 13, 2007 9:59 pm Disturbing Update, Keel's panties are readily visible. He is in fact, smooth as a porpoise down there. :x And No i'm not taking a picture of that. I'll leave her with a little dignity.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Nov 13, 2007 9:59 pm UrsusArctos wrote: I suppose Gendo isn't Gendo without the beard.

[]:             Quote Post by Barinax » Tue Nov 13, 2007 10:02 pm Reichu wrote: Barinax wrote: I think a male version of everyone would be interesting too.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue Nov 13, 2007 10:10 pm Reichu wrote: Yeah, I was seeing a bun, too.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Nov 13, 2007 10:16 pm BobBQ wrote: EWW! MISS WORMWOOD, CALVIN'S SHOOTING SPITBALLS!
